game.name: Kodi
game.desc: Kodi 21.3 "Omega" (released December 2025) is the current stable maintenance update for Kodi’s 21.x series — the free, open-source media center that turns any device into a full-featured home theater. It excels at streaming, playing local media, and running add-ons, with excellent support for 4K, HDR, and add-on ecosystems.
